items.title: scikit-learn PolynomialFeatures
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Official reference for generating polynomial and interaction features in Python pipelines.

items.title: The Elements of Statistical Learning — Section on polynomial regression
items.author: Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman
items.note: Treats polynomial expansions as linear models in expanded feature space; discusses bias-variance and regularization.

items.title: NumPy vander — Vandermonde matrix
items.author: NumPy Developers
items.note: Builds the [1, x, x^2, ...] design matrix for univariate polynomial fitting.
